TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ca-se-din-ni_yise, title = Ca-se-din-ni_yise, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ca-se-din-ni_yise} }

S.FORM: == Ca-se-din-ni yiseśü•Ś£ęšłĀŚįľšłÄšłĖ == Ca-se-din-ni yise u Ku-lio-ma zitay hedek nu sakaetiman a mikuwanay nu tademaw, nikuwanan nida mahida u Luo-ma-ti-kuo likisi namaka sumamaday pasayda i teban nu sumamad nu secian a sakaetiman nu malakuuytay. lawpesen nida ku Ya-den syeyen atu mikuwanay namaka Luo-ma kunhekuo zitay laya a kawaw. micunus ci nida tu hunti sakala nipabelian a kawaw, mahiniaya a waywayan tada palul'cus tu Luo-ma-ti-kuo u hungti malasaybakan, " malawama nu kanatal" atu " sayaway nu tademawan" a syakay nu waywayan. . likisi a syecia ci Pu-luo-ke-pi-e-se saan ci Ca-se-ten-ni yise a kawaw nida yadah ku kamu ci nidaan. Pu-luo-ke-pi-e-se a nicudadan katukuh ayda saan ci Ca-se-ten-ni yisean nipikuwanan u saetimay a cudadan. . kaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Ca-se-ten-ni nganganan nida ci Fuo-la-wi-yu-se.Pi-de.Sa-pa-ti-yu-se, alen nu sinawama ci Ca-se-tin yise malapadek sa sumad hank u nganganan ci Ca-se-tin-ni. pilecuhan hakiya i sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku tusa mihcaan itida i Se-lea-se-sin-sen-se-kaw-pi-ye nu malaukay a niyadu'an, malukay ku luma'. ci nida u Se-lea-se tademaw " caay kaw Se-la-hu tademaw, dayhan Sa-pa-ti-yu-se u Se-lea-se a nganganan". tada kamu nida u La-tin-yi, hakiya uyni ku sakanamuhan nida a Ti-kuo nutipanay a kawaw. ci Ca-se-tin-ni naw Ca-se-tin yise a iluc, Ca-se-tin u hitay ci nida, kapah ku kawaw nida sisa patapabaw han malatahudan, alaw malahungti. . Ca-se-tin yise sapadekan nida ci Ca-se-tin malawawa kapah ku nipahabay malamilaylayay a tademaw, imahin ci Ca-li-se itini i ti-kuo cen-ce u tahudan tu ci nida. kapatayan ni Ca-se-tin yise, patideng han ci nida malaHun-ti, pacupiyaway ku acawa nida, bangcalay a Di-aw-duo-la, nai' ku wawa tatusa. . limnemlim mihca caycay bulad caysip demiad Ca-se-tin-ni itida i Cun-se-tan-tin-paw mapatay. 565ŚĻī11śúą14 . sakay hekal a kawawŚ§ĖśĒŅ Ca-se-tin yise nganganan nida a kawaw sakay hekal sapiduduc tu Luo-ma a nipatideng tu kilisetu nu sikuan a kanatal. likisi syecia misuayaw tina kainian ninakawawan idaw ku wenday. idaw ku sananay ci Ca-se-tin yisean tu tenes a nikiyakuan tina kawawan, nika idaw ku sananay tina kawawan u lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku sepat mihcaan u tahudan nu hitay nida ci Pei-li-sa-liw mademec ku Wan-ta tademaw sisa malakawaw nida sa. Ca-se-tin yise sadikuday nida u La-ti-yi ku kamu nida a Tun-luo-ma hungti, pabaluhay midebung tu Ku-luo-ma kanatal a ahebalay nu lala'an. Pu-luo-ke-se-e'-se itida i likisi a cudadan nida tu " malepacaw" idaw ku nipikilukan tu ci Ca-se-tin yise a nikalepacawan. . nidaduyan a nakamuanŤ©ēŚÉĻ nikaydaan a likisi ni kinkiwan ci Ca-se-tin yise a nipikuwan nu zitayan mahida u Si-la-luo-ma zitay nikudanay a kapahay nu zitayan, ayda a nikinkiwan tuyni a kawawan idaw ku mahicaay kiya a kamuan. misuayaw tu nipatideng nida tu kanatalan katukuh ayda idaw henay ku cinglaw. ci Ca-se-tin yise hatidaay tu nu tenes a malpacaw yadah ku malawpesay nu Tung-luo-ma kanatal, tadayadah ku nikalawpesay nu Tung-luo-ma a kalisiwan. amica ku nikahida, hedek sa mikuwa tu Tung-luo-ma kanatal nai' ku nipabaliwan u Ti-cun-hay lilis a icelangan, nika uyni a nikaicelangan nu kawawan tada talakawtu ku nipacubelis. amica ci Ca-se-tin yise a sakay hekal a kawawan, sakay labu nu kawawan kacilicili han. micidek ku tawyaay a tademaw ni Ca-se-tin yise pihacen ku nipicilian ci nidaan. micidek ci Pu-luo-ke-pi-e-se itida i "mi-se" misuayaw ci Ca-se-tin yise patahekal tu picidekan a nipicilian. aydaay a lise-syecia tu sakacinlawan nu kitidaan ci Ca-se-tin yise a cen-ce' atu ayawan nida a tademaw ci Ca-se-tin yise nu kawawan tatengan idaw ku tabakiay nu laadan, atu Ca-se-tin-ni yise a kawaw tatengan haw sakalihalay a nisimsiman u linzi a nipatucekan. . kasilahecian ÁłĹÁĶź katukuh tu ayda ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise pala u sumamaday mautangay nu cacay a min-cun. nai' ku sapabaliw ci nidaan atu Tay-ke'-li since atu Cun-se-tan-tin ta-di' sakalecad u Ku-luo-ma tikuo mautangay nu sakaetiman a hung-tian. malamilaliday tu batad, pikuwanan nu matenesay a Hung-ti amisuayaw tu sapikawaw tu pulung nu kawawan caay kaw madayunmay. sipakayda i yadhay a musakamu ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise itida i O-cuo likisian nu sipakayda pasayda i cungseci a milakuuday, situngusay nu angangan a tademaw. . Ca-se-tin-ni yise malangatu mikawaw henay tu kanatal a picidekan nu angangan u Luo-ma henay a waywayan, kapatayan ni Ca-se-tin-ni-yise malaSi-la tu ku wayway. palawpesen nida ku Ku-luo-ma a kuo-min cucun, Hung-ti mala cun-cin nipabeli nu di'tu a kanatal cu-cun. nika tawya u Hung-ti mangalay henay tu hitay a nipacukel atu duyi. itida i Fa-sye atu Sen-sye ci Ca-se-tin-ni yese a sapaayaw nu nikudanay a sapalahat idaw ku picidekan a malalid. sakay hekal nida a sapalekal tu kanatal a kawaw patideng itida caay kaw tanektekay, ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise caay kaw matenesay a mapatay mahicaay tu kiya ku niyadu'. walian nu lilisan ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise yu maudip henay kanatal namangalay tu sakauip malingatu tu miedis. . ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise malingatu patideng tu kanatal a kiyaku u sadikuday a mapalekal hanipisepi han ku Luo-ma kanatala, nika caay kaw kapahay a tahudan, pikuwanan nida ba'ket ku dadimata'an nu tademaw, itida i kiwkiwkayan caay pisudang, amica ku nika hida nida ka caay pisudan caay tu kalaheci ku sapitunyi tu kanatal a mukti.
S.PHON: == ¶a-s…ô-din-ni jis…ô****** == ¶a-s…ô-din-ni jis…ô u ku-r~…ĺio-ma zitaj ńß…ôd…ôk nu saka…ôtiman a mikuwanaj nu tad…ômaw, nikuwanan nida mańßida u r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo r~…ĺikisi namaka sumamadaj pasajda i t…ôban nu sumamad nu s…ô ¶ian a saka…ôtiman nu mar~…ĺakuujtaj. r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku ja-d…ôn sj…ô…ôn atu mikuwanaj namaka r~…ĺuo-ma kunńß…ôkuo zitaj r~…ĺaja a kawaw. mi ¶unus ¶i nida tu ńßunti sakar~…ĺa nipab…ôr~…ĺian a kawaw, mańßiniaja a wajwajan tada par~…ĺur~…ĺ Ē~ ° ¶us tu r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo u ńßuŇčti mar~…ĺasajbakan, " mar~…ĺawama nu kanatar~…ĺ" atu " sajawaj nu tad…ômawan" a sjakaj nu wajwajan. . r~…ĺikisi a sj…ô ¶ia ¶i pu-r~…ĺuo-k…ô-pi-…ô-s…ô saan ¶i ¶a-s…ô-t…ôn-ni jis…ô a kawaw nida jadańß ku kamu ¶i nidaan. pu-r~…ĺuo-k…ô-pi-…ô-s…ô a ni ¶udadan katukuńß ajda saan ¶i ¶a-s…ô-t…ôn-ni jis…ôan nipikuwanan u sa…ôtimaj a ¶udadan. . kaudipan** ¶a-s…ô-t…ôn-ni ŇčaŇčanan nida ¶i fuo-r~…ĺa-wi-ju-s…ô.pi-d…ô.sa-pa-ti-ju-s…ô, ar~…ĺ…ôn nu sinawama ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô mar~…ĺapad…ôk sa sumad ńßank u ŇčaŇčanan ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni. pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ńßakija i s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku tusa mińß ¶aan itida i s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa-s…ô-sin-s…ôn-s…ô-kaw-pi-j…ô nu mar~…ĺaukaj a nijadu Ē~ °an, mar~…ĺukaj ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ¶i nida u s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa-s…ô tad…ômaw " ¶aaj kaw s…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßu tad…ômaw, dajńßan sa-pa-ti-ju-s…ô u s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôa-s…ô a ŇčaŇčanan". tada kamu nida u r~…ĺa-tin-ji, ńßakija ujni ku sakanamuńßan nida a ti-kuo nutipanaj a kawaw. ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni naw ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô a ir~…ĺu ¶, ¶a-s…ô-tin u ńßitaj ¶i nida, kapańß ku kawaw nida sisa patapabaw ńßan mar~…ĺatańßudan, ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺańßuŇčti. . ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô sapad…ôkan nida ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin mar~…ĺawawa kapańß ku nipańßabaj mar~…ĺamir~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj a tad…ômaw, imańßin ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-s…ô itini i ti-kuo ¶…ôn- ¶…ô u tańßudan tu ¶i nida. kapatajan ni ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô, patid…ôŇč ńßan ¶i nida mar~…ĺańßun-ti, pa ¶upijawaj ku a ¶awa nida, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a di-aw-duo-r~…ĺa, nai Ē~ ° ku wawa tatusa. . r~…ĺimn…ômr~…ĺim mińß ¶a ¶aj ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶ajsip d…ômiad ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni itida i ¶un-s…ô-tan-tin-paw mapataj. ********* . sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kawaw** ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô ŇčaŇčanan nida a kawaw sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sapidudu ¶ tu r~…ĺuo-ma a nipatid…ôŇč tu kir~…ĺis…ôtu nu sikuan a kanatar~…ĺ. r~…ĺikisi sj…ô ¶ia misuajaw tina kainian ninakawawan idaw ku w…ôndaj. idaw ku sananaj ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ôan tu t…ôn…ôs a nikijakuan tina kawawan, nika idaw ku sananaj tina kawawan u r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat mińß ¶aan u tańßudan nu ńßitaj nida ¶i p…ôi-r~…ĺi-sa-r~…ĺiw mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku wan-ta tad…ômaw sisa mar~…ĺakawaw nida sa. ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô sadikudaj nida u r~…ĺa-ti-ji ku kamu nida a tun-r~…ĺuo-ma ńßuŇčti, pabar~…ĺuńßaj mid…ôbuŇč tu ku-r~…ĺuo-ma kanatar~…ĺ a ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. pu-r~…ĺuo-k…ô-s…ô-…ô Ē~ °-s…ô itida i r~…ĺikisi a ¶udadan nida tu " mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw" idaw ku nipikir~…ĺukan tu ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. . nidadujan a nakamuan** nikajdaan a r~…ĺikisi ni kinkiwan ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô a nipikuwan nu zitajan mańßida u si-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺuo-ma zitaj nikudanaj a kapańßaj nu zitajan, ajda a nikinkiwan tujni a kawawan idaw ku mańßi ¶aaj kija a kamuan. misuajaw tu nipatid…ôŇč nida tu kanatar~…ĺan katukuńß ajda idaw ńß…ônaj ku ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw. ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô ńßatidaaj tu nu t…ôn…ôs a mar~…ĺpa ¶aw jadańß ku mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj nu tuŇč-r~…ĺuo-ma kanatar~…ĺ, tadajadańß ku nikar~…ĺawp…ôsaj nu tuŇč-r~…ĺuo-ma a kar~…ĺisiwan. ami ¶a ku nikańßida, ńß…ôd…ôk sa mikuwa tu tuŇč-r~…ĺuo-ma kanatar~…ĺ nai Ē~ ° ku nipabar~…ĺiwan u ti- ¶un-ńßaj r~…ĺir~…ĺis a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, nika ujni a nikai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nu kawawan tada tar~…ĺakawtu ku nipa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis. ami ¶a ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô a sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kawawan, sakaj r~…ĺabu nu kawawan ka ¶ir~…ĺi ¶ir~…ĺi ńßan. mi ¶id…ôk ku tawjaaj a tad…ômaw ni ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô pińßa ¶…ôn ku nipi ¶ir~…ĺian ¶i nidaan. mi ¶id…ôk ¶i pu-r~…ĺuo-k…ô-pi-…ô-s…ô itida i "mi-s…ô" misuajaw ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu pi ¶id…ôkan a nipi ¶ir~…ĺian. ajdaaj a r~…ĺis…ô-sj…ô ¶ia tu saka ¶inr~…ĺawan nu kitidaan ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô Ē~ ° atu ajawan nida a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô nu kawawan tat…ôŇčan idaw ku tabakiaj nu r~…ĺaadan, atu ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô a kawaw tat…ôŇčan ńßaw sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a nisimsiman u r~…ĺinzi a nipatu ¶…ôkan. . kasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian ** katukuńß tu ajda ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô par~…ĺa u sumamadaj mautaŇčaj nu ¶a ¶aj a min- ¶un. nai Ē~ ° ku sapabar~…ĺiw ¶i nidaan atu taj-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi sin ¶…ô atu ¶un-s…ô-tan-tin ta-di Ē~ ° sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u ku-r~…ĺuo-ma tikuo mautaŇčaj nu saka…ôtiman a ńßuŇč-tian. mar~…ĺamir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu batad, pikuwanan nu mat…ôn…ôsaj a ńßuŇč-ti amisuajaw tu sapikawaw tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kawawan ¶aaj kaw madajunmaj. sipakajda i jadńßaj a musakamu ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô itida i o- ¶uo r~…ĺikisian nu sipakajda pasajda i ¶uŇčs…ô ¶i a mir~…ĺakuudaj, situŇčusaj nu aŇčaŇčan a tad…ômaw. . ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô mar~…ĺaŇčatu mikawaw ńß…ônaj tu kanatar~…ĺ a pi ¶id…ôkan nu aŇčaŇčan u r~…ĺuo-ma ńß…ônaj a wajwajan, kapatajan ni ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni-jis…ô mar~…ĺasi-r~…ĺa tu ku wajwaj. par~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku ku-r~…ĺuo-ma a kuo-min ¶u ¶un, ńßuŇč-ti mar~…ĺa ¶un- ¶in nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu di Ē~ °tu a kanatar~…ĺ ¶u- ¶un. nika tawja u ńßuŇč-ti maŇčar~…ĺaj ńß…ônaj tu ńßitaj a nipa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ atu duji. itida i fa-sj…ô atu s…ôn-sj…ô ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni j…ôs…ô a sapaajaw nu nikudanaj a sapar~…ĺańßat idaw ku pi ¶id…ôkan a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid. sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nida a sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw patid…ôŇč itida ¶aaj kaw tan…ôkt…ôkaj, ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô ¶aaj kaw mat…ôn…ôsaj a mapataj mańßi ¶aaj tu kija ku nijadu Ē~ °. war~…ĺian nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô ju maudip ńß…ônaj kanatar~…ĺ namaŇčar~…ĺaj tu sakauip mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mi…ôdis. . ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ a kijaku u sadikudaj a mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ńßanipis…ôpi ńßan ku r~…ĺuo-ma kanatar~…ĺa, nika ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj a tańßudan, pikuwanan nida ba Ē~ °k…ôt ku dadimata Ē~ °an nu tad…ômaw, itida i kiwkiwkajan ¶aaj pisudaŇč, ami ¶a ku nika ńßida nida ka ¶aaj pisudan ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku sapitunji tu kanatar~…ĺ a mukti.
S.FORM: == Ca-se-din-ni yiseśü•Ś£ęšłĀŚįľšłÄšłĖ == Ca-se-din-ni yise u Ku-lio-ma zitay hedek nu sakaetiman a mikuwanay nu tademaw, nikuwanan nida mahida u Luo-ma-ti-kuo likisi namaka sumamaday pasayda i teban nu sumamad nu secian a sakaetiman nu malakuuytay. lawpesen nida ku Ya-den syeyen atu mikuwanay namaka Luo-ma kunhekuo zitay laya a kawaw. micunus ci nida tu hunti sakala nipabelian a kawaw, mahiniaya a waywayan tada palul'cus tu Luo-ma-ti-kuo u hungti malasaybakan, " malawama nu kanatal" atu " sayaway nu tademawan" a syakay nu waywayan. . likisi a syecia ci Pu-luo-ke-pi-e-se saan ci Ca-se-ten-ni yise a kawaw nida yadah ku kamu ci nidaan. Pu-luo-ke-pi-e-se a nicudadan katukuh ayda saan ci Ca-se-ten-ni yisean nipikuwanan u saetimay a cudadan. . kaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Ca-se-ten-ni nganganan nida ci Fuo-la-wi-yu-se.Pi-de.Sa-pa-ti-yu-se, alen nu sinawama ci Ca-se-tin yise malapadek sa sumad hank u nganganan ci Ca-se-tin-ni. pilecuhan hakiya i sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku tusa mihcaan itida i Se-lea-se-sin-sen-se-kaw-pi-ye nu malaukay a niyadu'an, malukay ku luma'. ci nida u Se-lea-se tademaw " caay kaw Se-la-hu tademaw, dayhan Sa-pa-ti-yu-se u Se-lea-se a nganganan". tada kamu nida u La-tin-yi, hakiya uyni ku sakanamuhan nida a Ti-kuo nutipanay a kawaw. ci Ca-se-tin-ni naw Ca-se-tin yise a iluc, Ca-se-tin u hitay ci nida, kapah ku kawaw nida sisa patapabaw han malatahudan, alaw malahungti. . Ca-se-tin yise sapadekan nida ci Ca-se-tin malawawa kapah ku nipahabay malamilaylayay a tademaw, imahin ci Ca-li-se itini i ti-kuo cen-ce u tahudan tu ci nida. kapatayan ni Ca-se-tin yise, patideng han ci nida malaHun-ti, pacupiyaway ku acawa nida, bangcalay a Di-aw-duo-la, nai' ku wawa tatusa. . limnemlim mihca caycay bulad caysip demiad Ca-se-tin-ni itida i Cun-se-tan-tin-paw mapatay. 565ŚĻī11śúą14 . sakay hekal a kawawŚ§ĖśĒŅ Ca-se-tin yise nganganan nida a kawaw sakay hekal sapiduduc tu Luo-ma a nipatideng tu kilisetu nu sikuan a kanatal. likisi syecia misuayaw tina kainian ninakawawan idaw ku wenday. idaw ku sananay ci Ca-se-tin yisean tu tenes a nikiyakuan tina kawawan, nika idaw ku sananay tina kawawan u lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku sepat mihcaan u tahudan nu hitay nida ci Pei-li-sa-liw mademec ku Wan-ta tademaw sisa malakawaw nida sa. Ca-se-tin yise sadikuday nida u La-ti-yi ku kamu nida a Tun-luo-ma hungti, pabaluhay midebung tu Ku-luo-ma kanatal a ahebalay nu lala'an. Pu-luo-ke-se-e'-se itida i likisi a cudadan nida tu " malepacaw" idaw ku nipikilukan tu ci Ca-se-tin yise a nikalepacawan. . nidaduyan a nakamuanŤ©ēŚÉĻ nikaydaan a likisi ni kinkiwan ci Ca-se-tin yise a nipikuwan nu zitayan mahida u Si-la-luo-ma zitay nikudanay a kapahay nu zitayan, ayda a nikinkiwan tuyni a kawawan idaw ku mahicaay kiya a kamuan. misuayaw tu nipatideng nida tu kanatalan katukuh ayda idaw henay ku cinglaw. ci Ca-se-tin yise hatidaay tu nu tenes a malpacaw yadah ku malawpesay nu Tung-luo-ma kanatal, tadayadah ku nikalawpesay nu Tung-luo-ma a kalisiwan. amica ku nikahida, hedek sa mikuwa tu Tung-luo-ma kanatal nai' ku nipabaliwan u Ti-cun-hay lilis a icelangan, nika uyni a nikaicelangan nu kawawan tada talakawtu ku nipacubelis. amica ci Ca-se-tin yise a sakay hekal a kawawan, sakay labu nu kawawan kacilicili han. micidek ku tawyaay a tademaw ni Ca-se-tin yise pihacen ku nipicilian ci nidaan. micidek ci Pu-luo-ke-pi-e-se itida i "mi-se" misuayaw ci Ca-se-tin yise patahekal tu picidekan a nipicilian. aydaay a lise-syecia tu sakacinlawan nu kitidaan ci Ca-se-tin yise a cen-ce' atu ayawan nida a tademaw ci Ca-se-tin yise nu kawawan tatengan idaw ku tabakiay nu laadan, atu Ca-se-tin-ni yise a kawaw tatengan haw sakalihalay a nisimsiman u linzi a nipatucekan. . kasilahecian ÁłĹÁĶź katukuh tu ayda ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise pala u sumamaday mautangay nu cacay a min-cun. nai' ku sapabaliw ci nidaan atu Tay-ke'-li since atu Cun-se-tan-tin ta-di' sakalecad u Ku-luo-ma tikuo mautangay nu sakaetiman a hung-tian. malamilaliday tu batad, pikuwanan nu matenesay a Hung-ti amisuayaw tu sapikawaw tu pulung nu kawawan caay kaw madayunmay. sipakayda i yadhay a musakamu ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise itida i O-cuo likisian nu sipakayda pasayda i cungseci a milakuuday, situngusay nu angangan a tademaw. . Ca-se-tin-ni yise malangatu mikawaw henay tu kanatal a picidekan nu angangan u Luo-ma henay a waywayan, kapatayan ni Ca-se-tin-ni-yise malaSi-la tu ku wayway. palawpesen nida ku Ku-luo-ma a kuo-min cucun, Hung-ti mala cun-cin nipabeli nu di'tu a kanatal cu-cun. nika tawya u Hung-ti mangalay henay tu hitay a nipacukel atu duyi. itida i Fa-sye atu Sen-sye ci Ca-se-tin-ni yese a sapaayaw nu nikudanay a sapalahat idaw ku picidekan a malalid. sakay hekal nida a sapalekal tu kanatal a kawaw patideng itida caay kaw tanektekay, ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise caay kaw matenesay a mapatay mahicaay tu kiya ku niyadu'. walian nu lilisan ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise yu maudip henay kanatal namangalay tu sakauip malingatu tu miedis. . ci Ca-se-tin-ni yise malingatu patideng tu kanatal a kiyaku u sadikuday a mapalekal hanipisepi han ku Luo-ma kanatala, nika caay kaw kapahay a tahudan, pikuwanan nida ba'ket ku dadimata'an nu tademaw, itida i kiwkiwkayan caay pisudang, amica ku nika hida nida ka caay pisudan caay tu kalaheci ku sapitunyi tu kanatal a mukti.
S.PHON: == ¶a-s…ô-din-ni jis…ô****** == ¶a-s…ô-din-ni jis…ô u ku-r~…ĺio-ma zitaj ńß…ôd…ôk nu saka…ôtiman a mikuwanaj nu tad…ômaw, nikuwanan nida mańßida u r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo r~…ĺikisi namaka sumamadaj pasajda i t…ôban nu sumamad nu s…ô ¶ian a saka…ôtiman nu mar~…ĺakuujtaj. r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku ja-d…ôn sj…ô…ôn atu mikuwanaj namaka r~…ĺuo-ma kunńß…ôkuo zitaj r~…ĺaja a kawaw. mi ¶unus ¶i nida tu ńßunti sakar~…ĺa nipab…ôr~…ĺian a kawaw, mańßiniaja a wajwajan tada par~…ĺur~…ĺ Ē~ ° ¶us tu r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo u ńßuŇčti mar~…ĺasajbakan, " mar~…ĺawama nu kanatar~…ĺ" atu " sajawaj nu tad…ômawan" a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. pu-r~…ĺuo-k…ô-s…ô-…ô Ē~ °-s…ô itida i r~…ĺikisi a ¶udadan nida tu " mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw" idaw ku nipikir~…ĺukan tu ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. . nidadujan a nakamuan** ¶a-s…ô-tin jis…ô nu kawawan tat…ôŇčan idaw ku tabakiaj nu r~…ĺaadan, atu ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô a kawaw tat…ôŇčan ńßaw sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a nisimsiman u r~…ĺinzi a nipatu ¶…ôkan. . kasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian ** katukuńß tu ajda ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô par~…ĺa u sumamadaj mautaŇčaj nu ¶a ¶aj a min- ¶un. nai Ē~ ° ku sapabar~…ĺiw ¶i nidaan atu taj-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi sin ¶…ô atu ¶un-s…ô-tan-tin ta-di Ē~ ° sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u ku-r~…ĺuo-ma tikuo mautaŇčaj nu saka…ôtiman a ńßuŇč-tian. mar~…ĺamir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu batad, pikuwanan nu mat…ôn…ôsaj a ńßuŇč-ti amisuajaw tu sapikawaw tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kawawan ¶aaj kaw madajunmaj. sipakajda i jadńßaj a musakamu ¶i ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô itida i o- ¶uo r~…ĺikisian nu sipakajda pasajda i ¶uŇčs…ô ¶i a mir~…ĺakuudaj, situŇčusaj nu aŇčaŇčan a tad…ômaw. . ¶a-s…ô-tin-ni jis…ô a kuo-min ¶u ¶un, ńßuŇč-ti mar~…ĺa ¶un- ¶in nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu di Ē~ °tu a kanatar~…ĺ ¶u- ¶un. nika tawja u ńßuŇč-ti maŇčar~…ĺaj ńß…ônaj tu ńßitaj a nipa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ atu duji. itida i fa-sj…ô atu s…ôn-sj…ô kanatar~…ĺ a mukti.
